7 #ifndef ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_IFUNCTION_H
8 #define ARCGEOSIM_ARCGEOSIM_PHYSICS_LAW_IFUNCTION_H
9 /* Author : desrozis at Tue Nov 6 14:11:49 2012

11  */
12 
13 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/VariableAccessor.h"
14 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/State.h"
15 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/Derivative.h"
16 #include "ArcGeoSim/Physics/Law1/EvaluationMode.h"
17 
18 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
19 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
20 
21 BEGIN_LAW_NAMESPACE
22 
23 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
24 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
25 
26 /*
27  * \ingroup Law
28  * \brief Interface de fonction pour les lois
29  *
30  * Utilis�e pour l'�valuation avec State et l'affichage
31  *
32  */
33 class IFunction
34 {
35 public:
36 
37  virtual ~IFunction() {}
38 
39 public:
40 
42  virtual Integer id() const = 0;
43 
45  virtual PropertyVector in() const = 0;
46 
48  virtual PropertyVector out() const = 0;
49 
51  virtual PropertyVector parameters() const = 0;
52 
54  virtual void eval(const State& s, State& r) const = 0;
55 
57  virtual void eval(const State& s, State& r, Derivative& d) const = 0;
58 
60  virtual bool isDifferentiable() const = 0;
61 
63  virtual bool isParameter() const = 0;
64 
66  virtual void evaluate(const VariableAccessor& v,
67  const Arcane::ItemGroup& g,
68  EvaluationMode mode,
69  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
70 
72  virtual void evaluate(const PartialVariableAccessor& v,
73  const Arcane::ItemGroup& g,
74  EvaluationMode mode,
75  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
76 
78  virtual void evaluate(const ArrayAccessor& v,
79  const Arcane::Integer& begin,
80  const Arcane::Integer& end,
81  EvaluationMode mode,
82  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
83 
85  virtual void evaluate(const ScalarAccessor& v,
86  EvaluationMode mode,
87  Arcane::Integer max_nb_unknowns = 0) const = 0;
88 };
89 
90 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
91 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
92 
93 // Pour le debug
94 inline std::ostream& operator<<(std::ostream& nout, const IFunction& f)
95 {
96  if(f.isDifferentiable())
97  nout << "- (differentiable)";
98  else
99  nout << "- (non-differentiable)";
100  nout << " function[id=" << f.id() << "] : ";
101  nout << " in = { ";
102  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i < f.in().size(); ++i)
103  nout << f.in()[i].name() << " ";
104  nout << "}, out = { ";
105  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i < f.out().size(); ++i)
106  nout << f.out()[i].name() << " ";
107  nout << "}, params = { ";
108  for(Arcane::Integer i=0; i < f.parameters().size(); ++i)
109  nout << f.parameters()[i].name() << " ";
110  nout << "}";
111  return nout;
112 }
113 
114 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
115 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
116 
117 END_LAW_NAMESPACE
118

120 /*---------------------------------------------------------------------------*/
121
